question: Map Handicap: SHK (-1.5) vs MIBR (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Sharks and MIBR in the BetBoom RUSH B! Summit Playoffs, scheduled for January 18 at 6:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Sharks" if Sharks wins 2 or more maps than MIBR in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "MIBR".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 20, 10PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 19 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Norman Powell records more than 2.5 assists during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Norman Powell records 2.5 assists or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Heat vs. Warriors
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 19 at 10:00PM ET:
If the Heat win, the market will resolve to "Heat".
If the Warriors win, the market will resolve to "Warriors".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

question: Series: Team WE Kill Handicap (-16.5) vs ThunderTalk Gaming (+16.5)
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between ThunderTalk Gaming and Team WE in the LPL Group Perseverance, scheduled for January 19 at 2:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team WE" if Team WE secures 17 or more kills than ThunderTalk Gaming in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "ThunderTalk Gaming".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Series: Team WE Kill Handicap (-16.5) vs ThunderTalk Gaming (+16.5)

events.title: LoL: ThunderTalk Gaming vs Team WE (BO3) - LPL Group Perseverance
events.description:
This market will resolve to "ThunderTalk Gaming" if ThunderTalk Gaming win against Team WE in the named LoL match in the LPL Group Perseverance, scheduled for January 19 at 2:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Team WE" if Team WE win against ThunderTalk Gaming in the LoL match.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 21, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will the price of Knife Index be above $200 on January 26?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the CS2 Knife Index price on dupe.fi for the date specified in the title is strictly greater than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is dupe.fi, specifically the CS2 Knife Index price available at https://dupe.fi/insights, with "Last Week" selected as the Calculation Methodology. 

The daily price for a given date becomes final at the end of that calendar day (midnight UTC) and is displayed on the chart the following day.

Please note that this market is about the price according to the dupe.fi CS2 Knife Index, not according to other sources such as Steam Community Market or third-party sites.

question: Will the price of Doppler Index be above $640 on January 26?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the CS2 Doppler Index price on dupe.fi for the date specified in the title is strictly greater than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is dupe.fi, specifically the CS2 Doppler Index price available at https://dupe.fi/insights, with "Last Week" selected as the Calculation Methodology. 

The daily price for a given date becomes final at the end of that calendar day (midnight UTC) and is displayed on the chart the following day.

Please note that this market is about the price according to the dupe.fi CS2 Doppler Index, not according to other sources such as Steam Community Market or third-party sites.
